html:
Brunch, meetings, sleep, repeat! The Revolv3 team was busy at the Money20/20 2023 conference in Las Vegas, CA. Revolv3 is dedicated to being at the forefront of the payments industry. Our presence at the world's largest fintech conference provided us with some invaluable insights and allowed us to connect with merchants, partners, and fellow payment professionals.  If you missed the conference or would just like to reminisce, we have a recap from the Revolv3 perspective.  

Brunch with Worldpay and Signifyd: Kicking Off in Style

Revolv3 started the conference off by co-hosting a Sunday brunch at SUSHISAMBA with Worldpay and Signifyd that brought together the best and brightest in payments. The brunch set the stage for a conference filled with innovation and partnerships. Over delicious canapes and cocktails, attendees had the opportunity to network, exchange ideas, and learn how Revolv3, Worldpay, and Signifyd are optimizing the payment journey.

The Emergence of Niche Payment Solutions

One of the primary objectives of Money 20/20 is to facilitate connections, and Revolv3 embraced this. Throughout the conference, the team actively engaged with partners and clients, solidifying existing relationships and forging new ones. Among those connections, the Revolv3 team noticed an emergence of very impressive niche companies and platforms for a variety of payment solutions. Payments can be complex, so it’s great to see so many solutions for each niche in the payment ecosystem. Revolv3's unique approach stands out due to its meticulous treatment of each payment authorization request, the ability for the merchant to tailor configurations, and a pricing model that partners with the merchant's success.

The Future of Payments

As we look back on Money 20/20 2023, we can't help but be excited about what the future holds for payments. This event serves as a hub for the dynamic and ever-evolving world of fintech, showcasing the incredible potential for growth, collaboration, and technological advancement. Revolv3 is proud to be a part of this story that's being written.

Transform Your Payments Into a Top-Line Growth Accelerator

Most importantly, Money20/20 highlighted the importance of quickly adapting to change to meet consumer expectations and stay relevant in the digital age. To achieve success, it’s crucial for e-commerce merchants to partner with innovative payments companies that not only understand the latest trends but are also positioned at the forefront of innovation. Embracing changes and collaborating with forward-thinking partners will empower businesses to navigate the ever-shifting e-commerce landscape and stay profitable in the long term.

About Revolv3

Revolv3 is a full-stack payment optimization and orchestration platform that is redefining the way businesses handle payments. Our cutting-edge technology brings a new level of efficiency and effectiveness to payment processing. By maximizing credit card acceptance rates and minimizing false declines, Revolv3 is helping businesses achieve transformative revenue growth and unparalleled customer retention. To see how your business can improve your revenue and retain more clients, set up a demo with us.
